PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("E:\\A - WORKS\\A - ICTechnology\\Works\\Power House Law\\Materials\\Menu on Home.docx"\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq "document.xml" } | Select-Object -First 1; $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($entry.Open\(\)\); $content = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Dispose\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $content | Out-String)

PowerShell($docPath = "E:\\A - WORKS\\A - ICTechnology\\Works\\Power House Law\\Materials\\Menu on Home.docx"; $tempDir = "$env:TEMP\\docx_extract_$\(Get-Random\)"; mkdir $tempDir | Out-Null; $shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $zip = $shell.NameSpace\($docPath\); $dest = $shell.NameSpace\($tempDir\); $dest.CopyHere\($zip.Items\(\), 16\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $xmlContent = Get-Content "$tempDir\\word\\document.xml" -Raw; $xmlContent | Out-String)

PowerShell($tempDir = "$env:TEMP\\docx_extract_$\(Get-Random\)"; mkdir $tempDir | Out-Null; $docPath = "E:\\A - WORKS\\A - ICTechnology\\Works\\Power House Law\\Materials\\Menu on Home.docx"; cmd /c "cd /d $tempDir && powershell -NoProfile -Command `"Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\('$docPath', '.'\)`""; $xmlContent = Get-Content "$tempDir\\word\\document.xml" -Raw -ErrorAction Stop; [System.Xml.XmlDocument] $xml = New-Object System.Xml.XmlDocument; $xml.LoadXml\($xmlContent\); $xml.DocumentElement.InnerText)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("E:\\A - WORKS\\A - ICTechnology\\Works\\Power House Law\\Power House Law_Claude\\index.html"\); Write-Output "First 5 bytes \(BOM check\):"; $bytes[0..4] | ForEach-Object { "{0:X2}" -f $_ }; ""; Write-Output "Decoded as UTF-8:"; [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes[0..200]\))
